goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'worth house'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 14:30' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '6 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called worth house
Make sure you get whether they have internet
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 14:30 and should leave on tuesday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to bishops stortford
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
